records.event: Tesla becomes US citizen
Wardenclyffe Tower funded by Morgan
Morgan withdraws Wardenclyffe funding
Wardenclyffe demolished. Tesla financial collapse begins.
Tesla speech at Orange Hall Springfield MA, Friends of Russia. Hoover memo generated. Kenneth [REDACTED] cross-referenced.
Tesla claims Death Ray / teleforce device. Attempts military sale.
Hoover receives NYT Tesla interview from unnamed citizen. Active FBI file begins.
Tesla found dead, Room 3327, Hotel New Yorker, NYC. OFFICIAL DATE.
Tesla death date per FBI documents. DISCREPANCY WITH OFFICIAL RECORD — unresolved.
Trump begins 2-day evaluation of 80 trunks of Tesla papers.
Trump concludes evaluation. Declares nothing of significant value.
Hoover personally signs FBI memo detailing Tesla torpedo work. Warns of enemy hands. Kenneth [REDACTED] cross-reference.
Kosanovic theft allegation filed. Heavily redacted resolution.
Biography Prodigal Genius published — claims FBI has Tesla papers. Hoover begins public denial campaign that lasts decades.
80 trunks held by OAPC. Location unknown even to OAPC internally. 8-year custody gap.
60 trunks shipped to Belgrade on ship Serbia. 20 trunks unaccounted for. No reconciliation document released.
Nikola Tesla Museum opens in Belgrade.
Sava Kosanović dies. One year after museum opened. No independent cause-of-death verification.
Death ray technical papers found at Belgrade museum. Officially do not contradict Trump evaluation.
FBI releases 250 pages via FOIA. Significant redactions remain. Multiple pages still blacked out.
Additional FBI release. More redactions. Some documents still entirely withheld.
